title: Crowding-Out or Crowding-In? The Effects of Idea Evaluation on Evaluators’ Idea Generation
abstract: Organizations rely on their employees to produce many high-quality ideas for the improvement of products, processes, and strategies. Evaluators such as managers and technical experts need to not only assess these ideas but also face expectations to contribute ideas of their own. We investigate this task duality by asking how idea evaluation activities affect evaluators’ ideation performance. Although much of the creativity and innovation literature points to a crowding-out effect, some theoretical arguments support idea crowding-in. Using data from a multinational firm’s idea management system and a difference-in-differences framework, we find robust evidence of substantial idea crowding-in: Evaluators’ likelihood of idea generation increases by 205% on the day that they evaluate ideas and remains elevated for the following two weeks. Extensive analyses support knowledge recombination as the key mechanism: By exposing evaluators to unfamiliar knowledge, idea evaluation creates new opportunities for recombination and idea generation. The ideas that evaluators generate postevaluation are 19% more valuable (but not more novel) than those they generate outside the postevaluation window. We contribute to innovation scholarship by identifying a hitherto overlooked effect of idea evaluation: triggering idea generation among evaluators. This paper was accepted by Karan Girotra, operations management. Funding: J. Schnier and C. Raasch acknowledge funding from the Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft [Grant RA 1798/4-1]. T. Schweisfurth acknowledges funding from the Tempowerk Technology Center Hamburg. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03335 .
title_cn: 挤出效应还是挤入效应？创意评估对评估者创意生成的影响
abstract_cn: 组织依赖于员工提出许多高质量的创意，以改善产品、流程和战略。评估者，如经理和技术专家，不仅需要评估这些创意，还面临贡献自己创意的期望。我们通过探讨创意评估活动如何影响评估者的创意表现来研究这项任务的双重性。尽管大多数创造力和创新文献指出了“挤出效应”，但一些理论论证支持“挤入效应”。通过使用一家跨国公司的创意管理系统数据和差异中的差异框架，我们发现显著的创意挤入效应的强有力证据：评估者在评估创意的当天，其产生创意的可能性增加了205%，并在随后的两周内保持升高。广泛的分析支持知识重组作为关键机制：通过让评估者接触到不熟悉的知识，创意评估为重组和创意产生创造了新的机会。评估者在评估后生成的创意比他们在评估窗口外生成的创意价值高19%（但新颖性并没有增加）。我们通过识别创意评估的一个至今被忽视的影响——激发评估者的创意生成，为创新研究做出了贡献。本文已被Karan Girotra接收，发表在运营管理领域。资助：J. Schnier和C. Raasch获得了德国研究基金会[资助号RA 1798/4-1]的资助。T. Schweisfurth获得了汉堡Tempowerk科技中心的资助。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03335获取。

title: Willful Ignorance and Moral Behavior
abstract: Consumers’ willful ignorance about the consequences of their actions may impede moral behavior. We test this concern in a real-world context based on a laboratory experiment and field data. We find that willful ignorance about farming practices increases consumption of meat from intensive farming, both in the laboratory and at university canteens. Individuals who prefer to avoid costless evidence are particularly responsive to it, yet their behavioral response vanishes within two weeks. Both findings demonstrate how difficult it is for organizations and governments to address willful ignorance through information interventions. This paper was accepted by Marie Claire Villeval, behavioral economics and decision analysis. Funding: This work was funded by the Austrian Science Fund [Grant 10.55776/F63] and the Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft [Grant CRC TR 224]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.01176 .
topics: Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 故意无知与道德行为
abstract_cn: 消费者对其行为后果的故意无知可能妨碍道德行为。我们在基于实验室实验和实地数据的真实情境中测试了这一问题。我们发现，对农业实践的故意无知增加了对集约化养殖肉类的消费，这一现象在实验室和大学食堂中均得到了证实。特别是，那些倾向于避免无成本证据的个体对此反应尤为敏感，但他们的行为反应在两周内消退。这两个发现表明，组织和政府通过信息干预来解决故意无知问题是多么困难。本文被玛丽·克莱尔·维尔瓦尔（Marie Claire Villeval）接受，涉及行为经济学和决策分析。资助信息：此次研究获得奥地利科学基金[资助编号10.55776/F63]和德意志研究共同体[资助编号CRC TR 224]的资助。附加材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.01176获取。

title: From Black to Gray: Improving Access to Antimalarial Drugs in the Presence of Deceptive Counterfeits
abstract: In malaria-endemic countries, the limited availability of affordable antimalarial medication has contributed to the widespread distribution of counterfeit drugs. This paper examines such markets to determine how philanthropic donors can best allocate limited funds to subsidize the purchase or sales of antimalarial drugs via private-sector distribution channels. We develop a game-theoretic model of the antimalarial supply chain wherein the retailer strategically sources legitimate drugs from a donor-certified supplier, potentially counterfeit drugs from an uncertified supplier, or both. In contrast with the extant literature, we demonstrate that, in the presence of counterfeits, exclusive reliance on purchase subsidies may no longer be optimal. Specifically, under donor budget constraints, offering sales subsidies that incorporate both legitimate and counterfeit drugs may be preferable or, in some cases, abstaining from subsidy provision completely. Additionally, we evaluate the implications of three pertinent nonsubsidy strategies deployed to combat counterfeit drugs: imposing penalties for sourcing counterfeits, eliminating subsidies on counterfeit drugs with traceability technology, and implementing price controls. Our study concludes with extensive numerical analysis calibrated to malaria data from Mozambique. Overall, this paper offers strategic guidance for improving outcomes in the presence of counterfeit drugs. Our results highlight the need for governments and donors to carefully consider market-specific factors, such as retailers’ pricing power and donors’ budget constraints, when designing subsidy schemes and access policies for life-saving medicines. These insights could potentially be extrapolated to address similar challenges in other endemic disease contexts, offering a broader framework for enhancing public health in resource-constrained environments. This paper was accepted by Jeannette Song, operations management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00885 .
title_cn: 从黑暗到灰色：在存在欺诈性假冒药物的情况下改善抗疟药物的获取途径
abstract_cn: 在疟疾流行国家，价格合理的抗疟药物供应有限，导致假药的广泛传播。本文研究了这一市场，以确定慈善捐赠者如何最佳分配有限的资金，通过私营部门分销渠道来补贴抗疟药物的购买或销售。我们建立了一个抗疟供给链的博弈理论模型，其中零售商会战略性地从经过捐赠者认证的供应商处采购合法药物，或从未认证的供应商处采购可能的假药，或者两者兼而有之。与现有文献不同，我们表明，在存在假药的情况下，单纯依赖购买补贴可能已不再最优。具体而言，在捐赠者预算限制下，提供同时涵盖合法药物与假药的销售补贴可能更为可取，或在某些情况下完全不提供补贴。此外，我们评估了三种与补贴无关的策略在打击假药方面的影响：对采购假药的行为施加处罚、利用可追溯技术消除假药的补贴，以及实施价格管制。我们的研究以针对莫桑比克的疟疾数据进行的广泛数值分析作为结尾。总体而言，本文为在假药存在的情况下改善结果提供了战略指导。我们的结果强调了在设计救命药物的补贴方案和获取政策时，政府和捐赠者需要仔细考虑市场特定因素，如零售商的定价能力和捐赠者的预算限制。这些见解可以在其他流行病的背景下被推广，以提供一个更广泛的框架，改善资源有限环境中的公共卫生。本论文已被运营管理领域的Jeannette Song接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00885 获得。

title: Unlocking Local Market Information Through Franchising
abstract: This paper examines the role of franchising in enabling firms to access valuable local market information. Using comprehensive data on U.S. franchised establishments, we show that franchisee-owned establishment openings robustly predict future local economic growth reflected by house price appreciation, whereas franchisor-owned outlets lack such predictive power. Franchisee investments are especially informative in markets with greater uncertainty and complexity and when facing higher investment hurdles. Franchisors appear sensitive to information frictions, avoiding direct investment in new markets that are geographically distant and lack direct flight connectivity. Our findings support the long-standing but untested assumption that franchisees possess superior private information. This paper was accepted by Maria Guadalupe, business strategy. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05903 .
title_cn: 通过特许经营解锁地方市场信息
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了特许经营在帮助企业获取有价值的地方市场信息方面的作用。通过对美国特许经营机构的综合数据分析，我们发现，特许经营者拥有的机构开业能稳健预测未来的地方经济增长，这种增长由房价上涨所反映，而特许人拥有的分店则缺乏这种预测能力。在市场不确定性和复杂性较高以及投资障碍较大时，特许经营者的投资特别具有信息价值。特许人似乎对信息摩擦较为敏感，避免在地理上较远且缺乏直飞联接的新市场中进行直接投资。我们的研究结果支持了一个长期以来但未曾验证的假设，即特许经营者拥有更优越的私有信息。本文由Maria Guadalupe接受，主题为商业战略。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05903获取。

title: Short-Lived High-Volume Bandits
abstract: When Thousands of Items Arrive Every Hour: A New Approach to Online Experimentation Researchers have reported a new approach to address a key challenge for online platforms. In a new paper in Operations Research, Jia et al. introduced the Short-lived High-volume Bandits (SLHVB) framework. This models modern platforms where thousands of items—such as ads, stories, or interface designs—arrive each hour but remain available only briefly. The study develops a near-optimal online learning policy that balances exploration and exploitation. Theoretical analysis shows the algorithm achieves nearly the minimal possible loss as the number of user impressions grows. The team tested the policy in a large-scale field experiment with Glance, a leading lock-screen content platform. The policy increased viewing duration by 4.32% and click-through rates by 7.48% compared to the platform’s existing deep-learning-based recommender system.
title_cn: 短期高容量赌徒
abstract_cn:
当每小时有数千个项目到达时：在线实验的新方法

研究人员报道了一种解决在线平台关键挑战的新方法。在《运筹学研究》的新论文中，贾等人引入了短期高容量赌博者（SLHVB）框架。这一模型适用于现代平台，其中数千个项目，如广告、故事或界面设计，每小时到达，但只短暂可用。该研究开发了一种接近最优的在线学习策略，旨在平衡探索和利用。理论分析表明，随着用户展示次数的增加，该算法实现了几乎最低可能损失。研究团队在领先的锁屏内容平台Glance上进行了大规模现场实验，测试了该策略。与平台现有的基于深度学习的推荐系统相比，该策略使观看时长增加了4.32%，点击率提高了7.48%。

title: Strategic Financing and Information Revelation Amid Market Competition
abstract: Problem definition: Interest rates on loans are often influenced by market prospects. Under asymmetric information, firms may attempt to signal strong prospects to lenders by over-borrowing. However, publicly revealing confidence in the market can also intensify competition. Motivated by these observations, we examine a firm’s financing and information disclosure strategy. Methodology/results: We develop a game-theoretical model where a firm with private information about the market prospect competes in quantity against a representative competitor. The firm has a limited amount of internal capital and must borrow from lenders to finance production. We show that when borrowing information is publicly accessible, the firm’s strategy depends on its capital needs and the level of competition. If capital needs are high and competition is low, the firm over-finances under strong market prospects to secure a lower interest rate. Conversely, if capital needs are low and competition is high, the firm under-finances under weak market prospects to reduce competitive pressure. Interestingly, in other scenarios, these opposing incentives neutralize each other, leading to a first-best outcome. We further explore private financing, where borrowing information remains undisclosed, forcing the competitor to rely on prior market information. We find that public financing generally dominates private financing under intense competition, but it can also be advantageous when competition is low and capital needs are high. Managerial implications: Our findings suggest that, under information asymmetry and competition, external borrowing can sometimes be beneficial by creating a counterbalancing force, and a slight increase in competition is not always detrimental when financing needs exist. History: This paper was selected as part of the 1RR initiative between the M&SOM Journal and the MSOM Society. This paper was part of the 2024 MSOM Service Operations SIG Conference. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0243 .
title_cn: 市场竞争中的战略融资与信息披露
abstract_cn: 问题定义：贷款利率通常受到市场前景的影响。在信息不对称的情况下，企业可能会通过过度借贷向贷方发出强烈的市场前景信号。然而，公开表明对市场的信心也可能加剧竞争。基于这些观察，我们考察了企业的融资与信息披露策略。方法论/结果：我们建立了一个博弈论模型，其中一个对市场前景具有私有信息的企业与一个代表竞争者进行数量竞争。该企业拥有有限的内资，并且必须向贷方借款以资助生产。我们展示了当借款信息公开可得时，该企业的策略取决于其资本需求和竞争水平。如果资本需求高且竞争低，企业在强市场前景下会过度融资以确保获得较低的利率。相反，如果资本需求低且竞争高，则企业会在弱市场前景下进行不足融资以减少竞争压力。有趣的是，在其他场景中，这些对立的激励会相互抵消，导致最佳结果的出现。我们进一步探讨了私人融资，在这种情况下，借款信息保持不公开，迫使竞争者依赖于先前的市场信息。我们发现，在激烈竞争下，公共融资通常优于私人融资，但在竞争较低且资本需求较高时，它也可能是有利的。管理启示：我们的研究表明，在信息不对称和竞争的情况下，外部借款有时可以创造平衡力量，且在存在融资需求时，竞争的轻微增加并不总是有害的。历史：本文作为M&SOM期刊与MSOM学会之间1RR倡议的一部分被选中，且是2024年MSOM服务运营SIG会议的一部分。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0243获取。

title: EXPRESS: Online Traffic Games: Should Firms Compete on Website Speed or Website Capacity?
abstract: In today’s fast-paced digital world, consumers demand instant access to online content and are intolerant of delays, making website speed a key competitive advantage in attracting web traffic. Google’s Speed Update and Core Web Vitals have further emphasized the significance of website speed in web traffic competition. This study examines how firms strategically compete for web traffic by managing website speed, focusing specifically on two distinct strategies: response-based and capacity-based. Under response-based competition, firms first set their desired website speed (or equivalently, website response time), subsequently determining the necessary website capacity. In contrast, in capacity-based competition, firms initially select the website capacity level, which in turn determines the website response time. We analyze a duopoly scenario in which two firms compete for web traffic. Although website speed and capacity are functionally related, surprisingly, firms sometimes compete more aggressively under response-based competition. Interestingly, the aggression of response-based competition can sometimes increase firms’ profits. We also show that when firms freely choose the decision process, firms sometimes engage in a mode of competition in equilibrium, which yields a lower profit for the capacity provider (e.g., computing capacity provider) than the alternative mode. We further show how the cloud provider can increase profit by strategically inducing firms to engage in a preferred mode of competition. This is achieved by lowering the unit price of renting capacity related to that mode of competition. This strategic price reduction can lead to faster websites for consumers, an increase in the provider’s revenue, and consequently an increase in the cloud provider’s profit under a cost-efficiency condition. The profit of firms can sometimes increase too, implying a win-win-win for all the parties, namely, firms, consumers, and the provider.
title_cn: 在线流量游戏：企业是应在网站速度还是网站容量上竞争？
abstract_cn: 在当今快节奏的数字世界中，消费者对在线内容的即时访问需求不断增加，且对于延迟的容忍度极低，这使得网站速度成为吸引网络流量的关键竞争优势。谷歌的速度更新和核心网页指标进一步强调了网站速度在网络流量竞争中的重要性。本研究探讨了企业如何通过管理网站速度来战略性地竞争网络流量，特别关注两种不同策略：响应基础竞争和容量基础竞争。在响应基础竞争中，企业首先设定其所需的网站速度（或等同于网站响应时间），随后确定所需的网站容量。相比之下，在容量基础竞争中，企业最初选择网站容量水平，这反过来决定了网站响应时间。我们分析了一个双头垄断的场景，其中两家公司竞争网络流量。虽然网站速度和容量在功能上是相关的，但令人惊讶的是，在响应基础竞争下，企业有时会更加激烈地竞争。有趣的是，响应基础竞争的激烈程度有时会增加企业的利润。我们还展示了当企业自由选择决策过程时，企业有时在均衡状态下采用一种竞争模式，这种模式会使容量提供商（例如计算能力提供商）的利润低于另一种模式。我们进一步展示了云服务提供商如何通过战略性地诱导企业参与更偏爱的竞争模式来增加利润。这是通过降低与该竞争模式相关的租赁容量的单价来实现的。这一战略性降价可以为消费者带来更快的网站，增加提供商的收入，从而在成本效率条件下提高云服务提供商的利润。企业的利润有时也会增加，这意味着对所有参与方——企业、消费者和提供商——都是一种三方共赢的局面。

title: From Lexicons to Large Language Models: A Holistic Evaluation of Psychometric Text Analysis in Social Science Research
abstract: Research Spotlight Abstract Extracting psychological insights from text is vital for modern analytics, yet organizations often rely on analysis tools that are either biased and simplistic or prohibitively expensive to build. Our research demonstrates that Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a superior alternative. They match the accuracy of specialized artificial intelligence (AI), while significantly reducing costs and technical barriers. Crucially for policy considerations, we find LLMs are statistically fairer than traditional methods. In our tests, they reduced racial and gender bias by up to 60%. Beyond assessing performance, we introduce a practical technique called “cognitive-affective prompting.” By instructing the AI to adopt specific human strengths, such as using “superior reasoning” for complex tasks or “emotional intelligence” for sentiment analysis, practitioners can boost accuracy by over 10%. To facilitate adoption, we provide a user-friendly “cookbook” to help nonexperts apply these findings immediately. For policymakers and business leaders, this research validates LLMs as a robust, consistent, and equitable standard for analyzing human behavior at scale.
title_cn: 从词典到大型语言模型：社会科学研究中文本心理测量分析的整体评估
abstract_cn: 研究聚焦 摘要 从文本中提取心理洞察对于现代分析至关重要，但组织往往依赖那些偏见严重、过于简单或构建成本高昂的分析工具。我们的研究表明，大型语言模型（LLMs）提供了更优的替代方案。它们的准确性与专业人工智能（AI）相当，同时显著降低了成本和技术门槛。对于政策考量至关重要的是，我们发现LLMs在统计上比传统方法更加公平。在我们的测试中，它们将种族和性别偏见降低了高达60%。除了评估性能外，我们还提出了一种实用技术，称为“认知-情感提示”。通过指导AI采用特定的人类优势，例如在复杂任务中使用“优越推理”或在情感分析中运用“情绪智能”，从业者可以将准确性提升超过10%。为了促进采用，我们提供了一个用户友好的“食谱”，帮助非专家立即应用这些发现。对于政策制定者和商业领袖而言，这项研究验证了LLMs作为分析大规模人类行为的稳健、一致和公平标准的有效性。

title: Are Auction-Based Promotions More Profitable for Short Video Platforms than Fixed Pricing?
abstract: Short video platforms increasingly offer paid promotion tools that allow creators to boost the visibility of their content. These tools are typically priced through either fixed fees or auction-based bidding systems. We examine how these two promotion mechanisms affect platform revenue, creator incentives, and the engagement of promoted content. Our results show that auction-based promotion does not universally outperform fixed pricing. Auctions generate higher platform revenue only when competition for viewer attention is sufficiently intense—that is, when the number of creators relative to viewers is high. When competition among creators is limited, fixed pricing can produce greater revenue while maintaining stronger engagement. We also find that auctions attract more creators to promote their videos, but this broader participation can dilute engagement by allowing lower-appeal videos into the promotion queue. For creators, auctions tend to benefit those with very high-appeal or very low-appeal content, whereas those with moderately appealing content may be disadvantaged. These findings suggest that platforms should align their promotion policies with the maturity of their creator ecosystems, utilizing fixed pricing in early stages and shifting to auction mechanisms as competition intensifies. Ultimately, our framework empowers managers to dynamically adapt their pricing strategies as their user bases evolve.
title_cn: 竞价促销对短视频平台是否比固定定价更具盈利性？
abstract_cn: 短视频平台越来越多地提供付费推广工具，允许创作者提升其内容的可见性。这些工具通常通过固定费用或基于竞价的拍卖系统定价。我们研究了这两种推广机制如何影响平台收入、创作者激励以及被推广内容的参与度。我们的结果显示，拍卖式推广并不总是优于固定定价。拍卖仅在观众注意力竞争十分激烈的情况下（即创作者与观众的比例较高时）能够产生更高的平台收入。当创作者之间的竞争有限时，固定定价可以在保持更强参与度的同时创造更大的收入。我们还发现，拍卖吸引更多创作者来推广他们的视频，但这种更广泛的参与可能会稀释参与度，因为低吸引力的视频也被允许进入推广队列。对于创作者而言，拍卖往往对那些内容极具吸引力或极低吸引力的创作者更为有利，而对那些内容适中吸引力的创作者可能不利。这些发现表明，平台应根据其创作者生态系统的成熟度调整推广政策，在早期阶段采用固定定价，随着竞争的加剧转向拍卖机制。最终，我们的框架使管理者能够根据用户群体的演变动态调整其定价策略。

title: Bargaining over Data and Analytics: Sellers, Buyers and Consultants
abstract: Most firms routinely gather vast amounts of data as part of doing business. Monetizing this proprietary data is an increasingly attractive revenue stream for many of these firms. Two fundamental decisions need to be made when deciding to sell, the first involving a choice between selling exclusively to a single buyer or nonexclusively to many, and the second related to what exactly should be sold—just the data or a data product that bundles data with analytics services. As firms often resort to bargaining to arrive at sale agreements, we analyze these decisions through the lens of a bargaining framework. When the buyer needs help from a third-party consultant, she too needs to make a decision—between negotiating separately with the seller and the consultant, and with both of them simultaneously. We find that there are situations where sellers can benefit from bundling the data with analytics services even when their analytics capabilities are weak relative to those of external consultants. Simultaneous negotiations enable buyers to extract more of the consultant’s contribution, making them preferable to buyers when consultants add substantial value. Broadly, this study provides a road map for structuring contracts to firms considering the sale of their proprietary data.
title_cn: 关于数据和分析的谈判：卖方、买方与顾问
abstract_cn: 大多数公司在日常经营中会收集大量数据。将这些专有数据变现，对于许多公司而言，正成为一种日益吸引的收入来源。在决定出售时，需要做出两个基本决策：第一个是选择是将数据独家出售给单一买家，还是非独家地出售给多个买家；第二个是确定出售的具体内容——是仅出售数据，还是将数据与分析服务打包销售。由于公司在达成销售协议时往往会进行谈判，我们通过谈判框架分析这些决策。当买家需要第三方顾问的帮助时，她也需要做出一个决定——是在与卖家和顾问分别进行谈判，还是同时与他们两者进行谈判。我们的研究发现，即使卖家的分析能力相对外部顾问较弱，在某些情况下，卖家仍然可以通过将数据与分析服务捆绑销售而获益。并行谈判使买家能够提取更多顾问的价值，这在顾问能够提供实质性价值时，使得此种方式更受买家青睐。总体而言，本研究为考虑出售其专有数据的公司提供了合同结构的路线图。

title: CEO Succession Under Anticipatory Awareness Misalignment
abstract: We develop a dynamic model of chief executive officer (CEO) succession under anticipatory awareness misalignment: the divergence between the board’s and the CEO’s private beliefs about the firm’s strategic potential. The CEO chooses unobservable effort, may send costly noncontractible signals, and faces interim termination based on performance thresholds. We derive closed-form expressions for optimal CEO incentive intensity, effort, and fixed pay and show how they are influenced by belief misalignment, CEO capability, and market frictions. We present propositions that explain how belief alignment affects effort and pay, how misaligned types are separated through signaling, and how misalignment impacts firing thresholds and the matching of boards and CEO. We show that misalignment reduces incentive efficiency, increases fixed pay, and increases the probability of early dismissal. CEOs aligned with the board receive higher variable compensation; misaligned types must compensate with signals or accept weaker incentives. The model generates empirically testable predictions on compensation structure, retention, and succession outcomes. Funding: A. Camuffo and A. Gambardella acknowledge support from the H2020 European Research Council [Grant 101021061]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.20384 .
title_cn: 在预期认知不一致下的首席执行官接替情况
abstract_cn: 我们构建了一个动态模型来研究首席执行官（CEO）接替过程中的预期意识不对齐，即董事会与CEO对公司战略潜力的私人信念之间的差异。CEO选择不可观测的努力，可能会发送成本高昂的非合同信号，并面临基于绩效阈值的中途解雇。我们推导出最优CEO激励强度、努力程度和固定薪酬的闭合形式表达式，并展示这些因素是如何受到信念不对齐、CEO能力和市场摩擦的影响。我们提出了一些命题，解释信念一致性如何影响努力和薪酬，如何通过信号传递隔离不对齐的类型，以及不对齐如何影响解雇阈值及董事会与CEO的匹配。我们发现，不对齐降低了激励效率，增加了固定薪酬，并提高了提前解雇的概率。与董事会一致的CEO会获得更高的可变薪酬；而不对齐的类型则必须通过信号进行补偿，或者接受较弱的激励。该模型生成了可实证检验的关于薪酬结构、留任和接替结果的预测。资金来源：A. Camuffo 和 A. Gambardella 感谢 H2020 欧洲研究委员会的资助 [拨款编号 101021061]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.20384 获取。

title: A Platform Rating System and Vulnerable Workers: Evidence from Field Experiments in Singapore
abstract: Rating systems are a common governance tool on two-sided platforms. Research suggests that, via indirect network effects, rating systems benefit participants on both the rating side and the rated side. However, participants on the rated side may not always recognize the benefits of the rating system and may respond negatively to its introduction. The rating side may anticipate the rated side’s negative reactions and react negatively as well, especially when the rated side holds more power over the rating side. To empirically examine participants’ reactions to a proposed platform rating system in the context of a substantial cross-side power differential, we conducted two field experiments in collaboration with a Singapore-based labor platform that connects foreign domestic workers with employers (families). We found that employers, on average, were indifferent to the proposed rating system, even when the benefits to them were highlighted, with the highest-income employers exhibiting negative responses. We also found that workers reacted negatively, with those informed of the proposed rating system completely disengaging from the platform. Post hoc interviews and analyses support our interpretation that power differential underlies workers’ negative responses to the rating system. This study contributes to the literature on platform rating systems by demonstrating that, in the presence of a substantial cross-side power imbalance, rating systems may not always be perceived positively, even by participants on the rating side, whom the system aims to empower. It also constitutes one of the first efforts in management research to study domestic workers, a highly vulnerable population of workers. Funding: This work was supported by Chazen Institute of Global Business (Columbia University) and INSEAD. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.18153 .
title_cn: 平台评分系统与弱势工作者：来自新加坡的实地实验证据
abstract_cn: 评级系统是双边平台上常见的治理工具。研究表明，通过间接网络效应，评级系统使评级方和被评级方的参与者受益。然而，被评级方的参与者可能并不总是意识到评级系统的好处，可能会对其引入作出消极反应。评级方可能会预见到被评级方的负面反应并作出相应的负面反应，尤其是在被评级方对评级方拥有更大权力的情况下。为了在存在显著跨方权力差异的背景下，实证检验参与者对提议的平台评级系统的反应，我们与一家新加坡的劳动平台进行了两项现场实验，该平台将外籍家庭工人与雇主（家庭）联系起来。我们的研究发现，雇主总体上对提议的评级系统表现出冷漠，即使在强调其对雇主的好处时，收入最高的雇主也表现出消极反应。我们还发现，工人们的反应也是负面的，其中那些被告知提议的评级系统的工人完全退出了平台。后续访谈和分析支持了我们对工人对评级系统的负面反应的解读，认为权力差异是其背后的原因。本研究通过展示在显著的跨方权力失衡下，评级系统可能并不总被积极看待，甚至评级方的参与者也未必对其持积极态度，贡献了关于平台评级系统的文献。同时，这也是管理研究中首次探讨家庭工人这一高度脆弱的工人群体的努力之一。资助：这项工作得到了哥伦比亚大学Chazen全球商业研究所和INSEAD的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.18153获取。

title: What Is the Price of Spanning Domain Boundaries? Distant Recombination and the Market Valuations of Firm Inventions
abstract: Do investors value firm inventions that recombine distant knowledge across domain boundaries? Analyzing more than 1.5 million firm patents, we find that, despite its strong association with long-term technological impact beyond the local domain, distant recombination of domain knowledge contributes less to a patent’s market valuation when compared to local recombination, thereby inducing a misalignment between valuation and impact. This valuation disadvantage is especially pronounced when distant recombination occurs in a domain primarily built on local knowledge, draws on knowledge from domains with broad applicability, and spans domains with limited connections. Mechanism tests suggest that the inherent evaluation and appropriation challenges for inventions built on distant recombination plausibly account for these findings. We thus establish domain distinctions in knowledge recombination as a key explanation of why innovations’ private returns may diverge from their technological impact despite the commonly assumed alignment between the two. Funding: The authors acknowledge financial support from Cornell University. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.17475 .
title_cn: 跨域边界的代价是多少？遥远重组与企业发明的市场估值
abstract_cn: 投资者是否重视跨领域边界重新组合远程知识的企业发明？通过分析超过150万项企业专利，我们发现，尽管远程重新组合的领域知识与超越本地领域的长期技术影响有着密切的关联，但与本地重新组合相比，远程重新组合对专利市场估值的贡献较小，从而导致了估值与影响之间的不一致。这种估值劣势在远程重新组合发生在主要依赖本地知识的领域时表现尤其明显，尤其是当其借用来自广泛适用领域的知识，并跨越连接有限的领域时。机制测试表明，基于远程重新组合构建的发明所固有的评估和收益获取挑战很可能解释了这些发现。因此，我们确立了知识重新组合中的领域区分作为一个关键解释，说明为何创新的私人回报可能与其技术影响存在差异，尽管通常认为两者之间是对齐的。资助：作者感谢康奈尔大学的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录可在以下网址获得：https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.17475 。

title: “We’re Not Designing with the Same Brain”: How Tattoo Artists Navigate Authority-Expertise Asymmetry to Sustain Creator-Client Co-Creation
abstract: Co-creation between creator–client dyads is becoming increasingly common in creative service work. In these settings, clients hold authority over creative decisions, while providers possess the necessary expertise to evaluate and execute the work, resulting in authority–expertise asymmetry. Yet, little is known about what unique challenges arise from authority–expertise asymmetry and how creative service providers navigate them to sustain co-creation. We address this question through an inductive study of 51 tattoo artists who collaborate with clients to create permanent, highly personal tattoos. Our analysis reveals that creative service providers experience authority-driven inputs as straining co-creation, specifically through strained visioning, feasibility, and participation. To sustain co-creation in the face of these challenges, the providers engage in facilitating co-creation practices, which we define as the set of deliberate practices through which providers shape how authority-driven client inputs enter and function in the interaction under conditions of authority–expertise asymmetry. This facilitation involves three interrelated practices: facilitating ideation, implementation, and coordination. Together, our findings advance a model of how co-creation can be sustained when authority and expertise are structurally decoupled, with implications for theories of co-creation, coordination, and creativity.
title_cn: “我们并不是用同样的思维设计”：纹身艺术家如何在权威与专业知识的不对称中维持创作者与客户的共同创作
abstract_cn: 创作者与客户之间的共同创作在创意服务工作中变得越来越普遍。在这些环境中，客户对创意决策拥有权威，而服务提供者则具备评估和执行工作的必要专业知识，从而导致权威与专业知识间的不对称。然而，目前对权威-专业知识不对称所带来的独特挑战及创意服务提供者如何应对这些挑战以维持共同创作知之甚少。我们通过对51位与客户合作创作永久性、个性化纹身的纹身艺术家的归纳研究来探讨这一问题。我们的分析揭示，创意服务提供者体验到权威驱动的输入会对共同创作造成压力，具体表现为在愿景、可行性和参与度方面的紧张。为了在面临这些挑战时维持共同创作，服务提供者采取了促进共同创作的实践，我们将其定义为提供者通过一系列有意识的实践来塑造权威驱动的客户输入在权威-专业知识不对称的条件下如何进入和在互动中发挥作用。这种促进涉及三个相互关联的实践：促进创意、实施和协调。我们的研究结果共同推进了一个模型，用以说明在权威与专业知识结构性脱钩的情况下如何维持共同创作，对共同创作、协调和创造力理论具有重要意义。

title: Institutional Logics and Relational Inequality in UK Surgery: Demographic Dominance and the Uneven Governance of Careers
abstract: Abstract Persistent gender and racial inequalities within elite professions remain inadequately explained by accounts focusing exclusively on either intra‐organizational processes or field‐level institutional dynamics. Relational inequality theory (RIT) provides a powerful account of closure within organizations but offers limited specification of how institutional environments shape variation in inequality outcomes. We bring RIT into dialogue with the institutional logics perspective (ILP), adopting a microfoundational lens to examine how demographic dominance and governance structures jointly shape career inequalities. Using longitudinal data on 3402 junior surgeons across 212 NHS trusts in England, we analyse promotion and exit outcomes across professional subspecialties and employing organizations. Intersectional inequalities are systematically associated with a dominant professional logic as captured by White male density (WMD). Higher WMD amplifies in‐group advantages and out‐group penalties. However, these effects vary across institutional contexts. Professional subspecialties exhibit stronger and more coherent dominance effects, whereas governance‐intensive trusts partially attenuate WMD‐associated advantages, particularly in formalized promotion processes, while exit patterns remain less responsive to governance constraints. In doing so, we clarify how the strength of relational inequality regimes varies systematically across institutional contexts and show that demographic dominance and governance centrality jointly shape when and where intersectional inequalities intensify or recede.
title_cn: 英国外科的制度逻辑与关系不平等：人口主导与职业治理的不平衡
abstract_cn: 摘要 在精英职业中，持续存在的性别和种族不平等现象，单靠关注企业内部过程或领域层面的制度动态的解释仍显不足。关系不平等理论（RIT）为组织内部的封闭提供了有力的解释，但对制度环境如何影响不平等结果的变异性则缺乏明确的说明。我们将RIT与制度逻辑视角（ILP）进行对话，采用微观基础的视角来考察人口主导性与治理结构如何共同塑造职业不平等。利用对英格兰212个NHS信托机构的3402名初级外科医生的纵向数据，我们分析了职业子专业和雇主组织中的晋升和离职结果。交叉性不平等与主导的职业逻辑之间存在系统性的关联，这一逻辑通过白人男性密度（WMD）来体现。更高的WMD会放大内部群体的优势并加重外部群体的惩罚。然而，这些效应在不同的制度背景下有所不同。专业子领域表现出更强烈且更一致的主导效应，而治理密集的信托机构则在一定程度上减弱了与WMD相关的优势，特别是在正式的晋升过程中，而离职模式对治理约束的反应则较弱。通过这一研究，我们澄清了关系不平等制度的强度在不同制度背景下的系统性变异，并展示了人口主导性与治理中心性如何共同塑造交叉性不平等加强或减弱的时机与地点。

title: From control to care: a digital CSR framework for alleviating labor exploitation in China’s time-critical express delivery industry
abstract: Purpose The explosive growth of China’s time-critical express delivery (TCED) industry highlights both the potential and the pitfalls of the digital platform economy. While delivering unprecedented convenience, its profit-driven model has triggered a corporate social responsibility (CSR) crisis, with frontline riders facing working conditions that increasingly resemble labor exploitation. This study addresses the critical disconnect between the efficiency-focused logic of algorithmic management and the urgent need for ethical platform governance. It investigates how the same digital infrastructure that enables control could be redesigned to promote care, fairness and social sustainability. Design/methodology/approach This study uses a qualitative research method, collecting primary data through in-depth, semi-structured interviews with riders in four strategically selected Chinese cities to capture diverse market contexts and rider profiles. This empirical evidence is triangulated with a systematic analysis of multiple authoritative secondary sources, including policy documents, investigative reports and industry publications. A rigorous thematic analysis identifies the structural and technological drivers of rider stress and exploitation, leading to the development of a novel Digital Corporate Social Responsibility (DCSR) framework. Findings This analysis uncovers a system of algorithmic domination, sustained by opaque and relentless time compression, the unilateral transfer of systemic risks onto riders and the institutionalized evasion of employer responsibilities. In response, a six-proposition DCSR framework is advanced. Its core actionable mechanisms – mandated algorithmic transparency, rider data sovereignty governing wearable technology, mutual rating systems to rebalance stakeholder power and data-driven dynamic incentives – are designed to ethically reconfigure platform architectures. Thereby, digital tools can be fundamentally transformed from instruments of control into foundations of care and equity, ultimately enhancing social sustainability while guarding against an advanced form of digital confinement. Research limitations/implications Findings are context-specific to China’s TCED sector. The rider-centric design, while deliberate, excludes other stakeholder views (e.g. platforms, regulators). The qualitative, exploratory approach establishes a theoretical framework that requires future empirical validation. This study bridges modern slavery/SCM, platform governance and DCSR literatures. The proposed framework offers actionable guidance for ethically encoding CSR into platform architecture, transitioning from algorithmic control to care-based governance. Originality/value This research makes three key contributions. First, it bridges the previously separate scholarly discourses on modern slavery and supply chain ethics, platform governance and digital transformation by introducing an integrative DCSR framework. Second, it provides empirically grounded, practical guidance for regulators and platform designers aiming to implement CSR in the digital economy, shifting the focus from critical diagnosis to constructive and technology-informed design. Third, it centers the lived experience and “folk theories” of riders as essential stakeholders, yielding crucial insights for ethical innovation and challenging top-down techno-solutionist approaches in the platform economy.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 从控制到关怀：缓解中国时效性快递行业劳动剥削的数字企业社会责任框架
abstract_cn:
目的 中国时间敏感快递（TCED）行业的爆炸性增长凸显了数字平台经济的潜力和陷阱。在提供前所未有的便利的同时，其利润驱动模式引发了企业社会责任（CSR）危机，前线骑手面临的工作条件日益类似于劳动剥削。该研究解决了算法管理的效率导向逻辑与对伦理平台治理的迫切需求之间的重大脱节。它探讨了如何重新设计同一数字基础设施，使其不仅能实现控制，而且能促进关怀、公平和社会可持续性。

设计/方法论 本研究采用定性研究方法，通过对四个战略性选定的中国城市的骑手进行深入的半结构化访谈，收集了原始数据，以捕捉多样的市场背景和骑手档案。这些实证证据与对多种权威次级来源的系统分析进行三角验证，包括政策文件、调查报告和行业出版物。一项严谨的主题分析识别了导致骑手压力和剥削的结构性和技术性驱动因素，最终提出了一种新的数字企业社会责任（DCSR）框架。

发现 该分析揭示了一种算法支配的系统，受到不透明和无情的时间压缩支持，系统性风险单方面转移给骑手，以及雇主责任的制度化逃避。为此，提出了一个六项命题的DCSR框架。其核心可操作机制——强制算法透明度、管理可穿戴技术的骑手数据主权、重新平衡利益相关者权力的互评系统以及基于数据的动态激励——旨在伦理性地重构平台架构。因此，数字工具可以从控制的手段根本转变为关怀和公平的基础，最终增强社会可持续性，同时防范一种高级形式的数字禁闭。

研究局限性/启示 研究结果具有特定的中国TCED行业背景。虽然骑手中心设计是蓄意的，但排除了其他利益相关者的观点（例如平台、监管者）。定性探索方法建立了一个理论框架，但需要未来的实证验证。该研究桥接了现代奴隶制/供应链管理、平台治理和数字企业社会责任文献。所提出的框架为在数字经济中伦理性地将CSR编码进平台架构提供了可实施的指导，推动从算法控制转向基于关怀的治理。

原创性/价值 本研究有三个关键贡献。首先，它通过引入一个综合的DCSR框架，连接了现代奴隶制与供应链伦理、平台治理和数字转型等先前独立的学术话语。其次，它为旨在实施CSR的监管者和平台设计者提供了实证基础的实用指导，将重点从批判性诊断转向具有建设性和技术信息的设计。第三，它将骑手的生活体验和“民间理论”视为核心利益相关者，提供了关键的见解，用于伦理创新，并挑战平台经济中的自上而下的技术解决主义方法。

title: Copying the Wrong Winner? When Noisy Attribution Reverses Mutual Learning Prescriptions in Denrell, Christensen, Knudsen, and Liu’s “The Impact of Learning Mode and Speed on Mutual Learning”
title_cn: 复制错误的赢家？当噪音归因反转Denrell、Christensen、Knudsen和Liu在《学习模式和速度对相互学习的影响》中的相互学习建议时

title: Boundary Conditions and the Juxtaposition of Externalities: An Extension to Anand et al.’s “Competitive Externalities in Acquisitions”
title_cn: 边界条件与外部性的并列：对Anand等人《并购中的竞争外部性》的扩展

title: The value of crowdshipping from microhubs in urban environments
abstract: Abstract We introduce a framework to assess the value of crowdshipping in last‐mile delivery at a strategic level with a focus on a wave‐based structure for delivery operations, considering service areas that are part of a larger urban environment. For each service area and wave, a truck departs from a depot and completes a route, including a visit to a microhub and a set of customers. The rest of the customers receive deliveries from crowdshippers, who pick up packages from the microhub. We derive a set of analytical results for this base model of the problem on a solid grid to provide strategic decision‐making insights into when crowdshipping can be implemented in a service area at a cost–benefit compared to truck delivery. For this setting, we derive the minimum cost solution based on whether the grid is even or odd and the location of the microhub. We find that the structure of the solution changes at certain breakpoints in the ratio of the cost of crowdshipping to the cost of truck delivery. To understand how the value of crowdshipping changes across settings, we provide a mixed integer programming formulation and extensions to more general settings that we evaluate in a set of computational experiments. We consider the impact of factors such as limited crowdshipper availability and multiple microhubs in a service area. We discuss the effect on the total cost of delivery and the number and location of customers that are assigned to crowdshipped delivery.
title_cn: 城市环境中微枢纽的众包配送价值
abstract_cn: 摘要 我们提出了一个框架，用于从战略层面评估众包配送在最后一公里交付中的价值，聚焦于基于波次的配送操作结构，考虑到作为更大城市环境一部分的服务区域。在每个服务区域和波次中，货车从仓库出发，完成一条路线，包括访问一个微中心和一组客户。其余客户则由众包配送员进行配送，他们从微中心取走包裹。我们为这个基础模型在一个稳固的网格上推导出一系列分析结果，以提供战略决策的见解，帮助判断在某个服务区域内何时可以实施众包配送，并与货车配送进行成本-效益比较。在这一背景下，我们基于网格的奇偶性和微中心的位置推导出最低成本解决方案。我们发现，在众包配送与货车配送成本比率的某些分界点上，解决方案的结构会发生变化。为了理解众包配送的价值如何在不同环境中变化，我们提供了一个混合整数规划的公式，并扩展到更一般的情境，并在一组计算实验中进行评估。我们考虑了有限的众包配送员可用性和服务区域内多个微中心等因素的影响。我们讨论了这些因素对配送总成本以及分配给众包配送的客户数量和位置的影响。

title: Measuring Stakeholder Theory Mindsets: Development and Validation of a Measurement Scale
abstract: For four decades, stakeholder theory has played a key role in many research fields, from strategy to business ethics. More recent developments in the field of behavioral stakeholder theory highlight the importance of individual managers and their mindsets. The role of stakeholder theory mindsets of managers, however, has not been empirically investigated. Despite the prominence of stakeholder theory in management research, no measurement scale exists at the level of individuals that would allow scholars to assess the degree to which a manager agrees with the key assumptions of stakeholder theory. This research develops a scale to measure managers’ stakeholder theory mindsets. To do so, we followed scholarly best practices: First, we generated items based on existing stakeholder theory literature and then had expert stakeholder scholars evaluate them. This step was followed by two independent studies for exploratory and confirmatory factor analysis and a nomological network study. The actual scale development was complemented by an additional study, which tests the predictive power of the stakeholder theory mindset scale and demonstrates its incremental validity. As a result, we propose a validated measurement scale of stakeholder theory mindsets, consisting of 18 items that load on four factors corresponding to the four main assumptions in stakeholder theory: value creation, the integration thesis, jointness of stakeholder interests, and the responsibility principle. We draw out how future research can be inspired by using this scale, which inter alia allows testing antecedents of stakeholder theory mindsets, as well as consequences for managerial decision-making.
title_cn: 测量利益相关者理论心态：测量工具的开发与验证
abstract_cn: 在过去四十年中，利益相关者理论在许多研究领域发挥了关键作用，从战略到商业伦理。近期的行为利益相关者理论的发展突显了个别经理及其心态的重要性。然而，利益相关者理论心态在经理层面的角色尚未得到实证研究的探讨。尽管利益相关者理论在管理研究中具有显著地位，但目前尚无测量工具能够在个体层面上评估经理对利益相关者理论关键假设的认同程度。本研究开发了一个测量经理利益相关者理论心态的量表。为此，我们遵循了学术界的最佳实践：首先，根据现有的利益相关者理论文献生成项目，然后邀请专家学者对其进行评估。接下来进行了两项独立研究，分别用于探索性和确证性因子分析以及名义网络研究。实际的量表开发得到了额外研究的补充，该研究测试了利益相关者理论心态量表的预测效能，并证明了其增量效度。因此，我们提出了一个经过验证的利益相关者理论心态测量量表，包含18个条目，分为四个因子，分别对应利益相关者理论中的四个主要假设：价值创造、整合论、利益相关者利益的共同性和责任原则。我们指出了未来研究如何受到该量表的启发，尤其是它可以用于测试利益相关者理论心态的前因，以及其对管理决策的影响后果。

title: How Boards Use Competitor CEO Awards to Interpret Firm Performance in CEO Dismissal Decisions
abstract: To what extent do boards integrate external comparative signals when making CEO dismissal decisions? Drawing on the board information processing perspective, we propose that competitor CEO awards shape the weight boards assign to firm financial performance in dismissal evaluations. Specifically, when competitor CEOs receive prestigious recognition, boards are more likely to interpret firm underperformance as evidence of managerial inadequacy, thereby increasing the likelihood of CEO dismissal. In contrast, when firm performance exceeds that of industry peers, competitor awards amplify positive evaluations of the incumbent CEO’s managerial competence, reducing dismissal likelihood. We further identify three governance-related boundary conditions, i.e., CEO compensation structure, board busyness, and board–CEO demographic similarity, that condition these effects by shaping directors’ evaluative expectations, available attentional resources, and relational biases. Using a longitudinal sample of U.S. publicly traded firms from 2006 to 2020, we find consistent support for our theoretical predictions. Our study contributes to the corporate governance literature by demonstrating the extent to which boards embed firm performance evaluations within a broader comparative informational context. In doing so, we also uncover indirect competitive spillover effects of executive recognition, showing that CEO awards influence not only recipients’ outcomes but also governance decisions within rival firms.
title_cn: 董事会如何利用竞争对手首席执行官奖项解读首席执行官解雇决策中的公司业绩
abstract_cn: 董事会在做出CEO解雇决策时在多大程度上整合外部比较信号？基于董事会信息处理视角，我们提出竞争对手CEO奖项会影响董事会在解雇评估中对公司财务表现赋予的权重。具体而言，当竞争对手的CEO获得声望卓著的认可时，董事会更可能将公司的业绩不佳解读为管理能力不足的证据，从而增加CEO被解雇的可能性。相反，当公司业绩超过行业同行时，竞争对手的奖项会放大对在任CEO管理能力的积极评价，从而降低解雇的可能性。我们进一步识别了三种与治理相关的边界条件，即CEO薪酬结构、董事会忙碌程度和董事与CEO的人口统计相似性，这些条件通过塑造董事的评估期望、可用注意资源和关系偏见来影响这些效应。使用2006年至2020年间美国上市公司的纵向样本，我们发现了对我们理论预测的一致支持。我们的研究通过展示董事会在更广泛的比较信息背景下嵌入公司绩效评估的程度，丰富了公司治理文献。在此过程中，我们也揭示了高管认可的间接竞争溢出效应，表明CEO奖项不仅影响获奖者的结果，还影响竞争对手公司的治理决策。

title: Identifying and Using Nonlinear and Interactive Control Variables
abstract: Nonlinear and interactive effects (NIEs) are central to management theory. Consequently, although researchers commonly include linear control variables, the omission of nonlinear and interactive control variables (NICs) can lead to incorrect conclusions because the omission can distort statistical tests and effect-size estimates. We reviewed 548 quantitative articles published between 2021 and 2023 in Academy of Management Journal, Journal of Management, and Strategic Management Journal. We discovered that about 73% tested for NIEs, but only 3% included NICs. Also, by reanalyzing a published study, we demonstrate that the exclusion of theoretically relevant NICs can reverse substantive conclusions, highlighting the threat such omissions pose to theory advancement. To address this methodological challenge, we introduce a five-step guide for systematically identifying, evaluating, and integrating NICs into research involving NIEs. The guide offers a structured, theory-driven approach that uses associations among model variables and their linear controls to determine which NICs are critical for unbiased estimation of NIEs. We also explain how to avoid over-control, maintain statistical efficiency, and transparently manage omitted NICs. Applying the five-step approach strengthens the validity of causal inference in studies of nonlinear and interactive effects and enhances the robustness of empirical results. In addition to improving estimation accuracy, the systematic and theory-based inclusion of NICs advances theory development by clarifying boundary conditions, distinguishing competing explanations, and enabling the cumulative integration of empirical results.
title_cn: 识别和使用非线性与交互控制变量
abstract_cn: 非线性和交互效应（NIEs）在管理理论中占据核心地位。因此，尽管研究者通常包括线性控制变量，忽略非线性和交互控制变量（NICs）可能导致不正确的结论，因为这种省略会扭曲统计检验和效应量估计。我们回顾了2021年至2023年间在《管理学会期刊》、《管理学杂志》和《战略管理杂志》上发表的548篇定量文章。我们发现约73%的研究测试了NIEs，但仅有3%包含了NICs。此外，通过重新分析一项已发表的研究，我们展示了理论上相关的NICs的排除可以反转实质性结论，强调了此类省略对理论进展构成的威胁。为了解决这一方法论挑战，我们提出了一份五步指南，系统识别、评估并将NICs整合进涉及NIEs的研究中。该指南提供了一种结构化的、以理论驱动的方法，通过利用模型变量及其线性控制之间的关联，来确定哪些NICs对NIEs的无偏估计至关重要。我们还解释了如何避免过度控制，保持统计效率，并透明地管理遗漏的NICs。应用这五步方法增强了非线性和交互效应研究中因果推断的有效性，提高了实证结果的稳健性。除了改善估计的准确性，系统且基于理论的纳入NICs推动了理论发展，通过澄清边界条件、区分竞争解释，并增强实证结果的累积整合。

title: Think Before You Speak: Sensemaking and Sensegiving in New CEOs’ Strategic Communications with the Capital Market
abstract: We extend research on strategic communication by introducing a theoretical model of how newly appointed CEOs engage in sensemaking and sensegiving with the capital market through their first communication of strategic priorities. We conceptualize strategic topic novelty, the distinctiveness of the topics emphasized relative to the predecessors’, as an observable dimension of new CEOs’ priorities that reflects how they reconcile their desire to establish a unique vision with the need to legitimize their appointment. Our theory suggests that new CEOs draw on situational cues, particularly the nature of the succession (dismissal vs. routine) and the initial market reaction to their appointment, when determining how much novelty to introduce. Specifically, we propose that new CEOs communicate higher strategic topic novelty following dismissals and that this relationship may be strengthened by positive market reactions to their appointment and weakened by negative market responses. We further expect that the capital market responds more favorably to strategic topic novelty following dismissals. Applying textual analysis of new CEOs’ communication in earnings calls from 2004 to 2018, we find a positive relationship between dismissals and strategic topic novelty, which is weaker for more negative market reactions to the new CEO’s announcement. We also find more positive capital market reactions to strategic topic novelty following dismissals. Our findings advance understanding of how new CEOs approach their role by integrating sensemaking with sensegiving in research on CEO communication and highlight how new CEOs asymmetrically adjust novelty in response to positive versus negative market reactions.
title_cn: 思考再发言：新任首席执行官在与资本市场的战略沟通中的意义构建与意义传递
abstract_cn: 我们通过引入一个理论模型，拓展了对战略沟通的研究，探讨新任首席执行官如何通过首次传达战略优先事项与资本市场进行意义构建和赋予。我们将战略主题的新颖性——相对于前任首席执行官所强调主题的独特性——概念化为新首席执行官优先事项的一个可观察维度，反映出他们如何在建立独特愿景的愿望与为其任命合法化的需要之间进行调和。我们的理论提出，新首席执行官在决定引入多少新颖性时，会依赖情境线索，尤其是接任的性质（被解雇与例行更替）及其任命的初始市场反应。具体而言，我们建议，新首席执行官在被解雇的情况下传达更高的战略主题新颖性，并且这种关系可能会因任命后的正面市场反应而增强，因负面市场反应而减弱。我们进一步预期，资本市场在被解雇后对战略主题新颖性的反应会更加积极。通过对2004年至2018年新首席执行官在财报电话会议中的交流进行文本分析，我们发现被解雇与战略主题新颖性之间存在正相关关系，而对于新首席执行官公告的更负面市场反应，这种关系较弱。此外，我们还发现，被解雇后对战略主题新颖性的反应，资本市场的反应更加积极。我们的研究结果加深了对新首席执行官如何看待其角色的理解，通过将意义构建与赋予整合到首席执行官沟通的研究中，强调了新首席执行官如何不对称地调整新颖性，以应对正面和负面市场反应。

title: Green Talent, Greener Outcomes? The Role of Governance in Translating Green Hiring into Substantive Environmental Action
abstract: Abstract This study examines whether green hiring is associated with enhanced firm-level environmental outcomes, using a novel dataset of 19,248,635 job ads for Fortune 100 firms from 2009 to 2022. We find that such hiring is positively associated with environmental performance, particularly through improvements in environmental innovation, supply chain monitoring, resource efficiency, environmental product development, and stakeholder engagement. Cross-sectional analyses reveal that the positive association is stronger when new green hires are distributed across diverse occupations and weaker when concentrated in top-level roles. In addition, green hiring is more strongly linked to outcomes in firms with strong sustainability governance, as evidenced by the presence of dedicated committees, environmental investments, standalone sustainability reports and environmental training. These findings indicate that green hiring’s potential benefits may rely on robust sustainability governance within firms. Such structures may help human capital investments yield measurable environmental performance gains and reduce the risk of green hiring becoming a symbolic gesture rather than a substantive commitment to stakeholders. However, the relationship concentrates only among firms in non-environmentally sensitive industries and larger firms. This study contributes to the environmental performance literature by providing new evidence on how workforce transformation relates to corporate sustainability and informs strategic approaches to building greener organizations.
title_cn: 绿色人才，更加绿色的结果？治理在将绿色招聘转化为实质性环境行动中的作用
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究探讨了绿色招聘是否与企业层面的环境成果改善相关，使用了一项包含2009年至2022年间19,248,635个财富100强公司招聘广告的新数据集。我们的研究发现，绿色招聘与环境绩效之间呈正相关，特别是在环境创新、供应链监控、资源效率、环境产品开发和利益相关者参与等方面的改善。横向分析表明，当新招募的绿色员工分布在多样化职业中时，正相关关系更加显著，而当其集中在高层职位时则较弱。此外，绿色招聘与具有强可持续性治理的公司的成果关联更为紧密，具体表现为专门委员会的存在、环境投资、独立的可持续发展报告以及环境培训。这些发现表明，绿色招聘的潜在益处可能依赖于公司内部强大的可持续性治理。这些结构可能有助于人力资本投资产生可衡量的环境绩效提升，并降低绿色招聘沦为象征性举措而非对利益相关者的实质承诺的风险。然而，这一关系仅集中在环境敏感性较低的行业和大型公司之间。本研究通过提供新证据，阐明了劳动力转型与企业可持续性之间的关系，进而为构建更绿色组织的战略方法提供了参考，丰富了环境绩效相关文献。

title: Offshoring’s hidden toll: mental distress among onshore employees
title_cn: 离岸运营的隐秘代价：岸上员工的心理压力

title: Upward convergence: digital regulations and digital firms’ internationalization
abstract: Abstract Digital regulations are often portrayed as barriers to digital firms’ internationalization because they hinder digital firms’ market penetration and fragment their global operations. We argue, however, that regulations may play a different role for digital firms that internationalize through virtual presence. Leveraging the European Union’s (EU’s) General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) as context, we examine how the GDPR affects digital products’ penetration in the EU and whether it drives operational fragmentation between EU and non-EU markets. We theorize that the GDPR does not uniformly reduce penetration opportunities; instead, it benefits low data-dependent products and explorative products that differ substantially from firms’ prior offerings. Moreover, building on digital firms’ reliance on network effects, we propose that digital firms may treat the EU as a global benchmark and release EU-penetrated products to non-EU markets, converging upward rather than separating their international operations, thus strengthening the positive association between EU penetration and subsequent non-EU entry. We found support for our hypotheses by analyzing international user-acquisition activities of the top 500 mobile game developers. Our findings contribute to international business research by showing that digital regulations can create new penetration opportunities and act as institutional catalysts that standardize digital firms’ cross-border expansion.
title_cn: 向上趋同：数字监管与数字企业的国际化
abstract_cn: 摘要 数字监管常被视为数字企业国际化的障碍，因为它们妨碍了数字企业的市场渗透，并使其全球运营碎片化。然而，我们认为，对通过虚拟存在进行国际化的数字企业来说，监管可能扮演着不同的角色。以欧盟通用数据保护条例（GDPR）为背景，我们考察了GDPR如何影响数字产品在欧盟的渗透以及它是否导致欧盟与非欧盟市场之间的操作碎片化。我们理论化地认为，GDPR并不会均匀地减少渗透机会；相反，它更有利于低数据依赖的产品和与企业之前产品有显著差异的探究性产品。此外，基于数字企业对网络效应的依赖，我们提出，数字企业可能将欧盟视为全球基准，并将经过欧盟渗透的产品投放到非欧盟市场，从而实现上升汇聚而非分离其国际运营，从而增强欧盟渗透与随后的非欧盟市场进入之间的积极关联。通过分析前500名移动游戏开发者的国际用户获取活动，我们找到了对我们假说的支持。我们的发现为国际商业研究作出了贡献，表明数字监管可以创造新的渗透机会，并作为制度催化剂标准化数字企业的跨境扩展。

title: Media Review: Broken Universities
title_cn: 媒体评论：破碎的大学

title: A worker cooperative takeover: Organizing radical transformation according to Lefebvre's experimental utopia
abstract: This article analyzes the seemingly impossible, radical transformation of a factory into a worker cooperative, despite a multinational corporation’s refusal to cede its brand and announced plans to shut down the factory and relocate its production. With a hybrid ethnographic approach, the current research addresses the interwoven (holistic) spatial and temporal dynamics of one such transformation. The resulting study builds on and expands Lefebvre’s concept of experimental utopia to the organization studies domain to clarify the process of radical transformation and the conditions in which a new social space gets produced within a collective survival context. Furthermore, this study introduces the notion of mechanotransducer, which is essential to the production of a worker cooperative. The results prioritize the value of a holistic spatio-temporal conceptualization of utopia, in accordance with a Lefebvrian perspective.
title_cn: 工人合作社的接管：按照勒费布尔的实验性乌托邦组织激进转型
abstract_cn: 本文分析了工厂在多国公司拒绝放弃其品牌并宣布关闭工厂、迁移生产的情况下，似乎不可能的激进转型为工人合作社。通过一种混合的民族志方法，本研究探讨了这种转型中交织的（整体的）空间和时间动态。研究成果在组织研究领域对列斐伏尔的实验性乌托邦概念进行了扩展，以澄清激进转型的过程以及在集体生存背景下新社会空间产生的条件。此外，本研究引入了“机械转导器”的概念，这对工人合作社的形成至关重要。结果强调了基于列斐伏尔视角的乌托邦的整体时空概念化的价值。

title: Media Review: Trebor Scholz and the Unfinished Experiment of Platform Cooperatives R. Trebor Scholz, Own This!: How Platform Cooperatives Help Workers Build a Democratic Internet
title_cn: 媒体评析：特雷博·肖尔兹与平台合作社的未竟实验 R. Trebor Scholz，《拥有这一切！：平台合作社如何帮助工人建立一个民主互联网》

title: They’ll conform anyway: A motivation stereotype perspective on the exploitation of Asian employees.
abstract: Perceptions of motivation play a critical role in shaping workplace treatment, yet little is known about how such perceptions are socially constructed. Drawing on social exchange theories and perspectives on interdependent versus independent self, we propose an ethnic-stereotype perspective of perceived motivation, suggesting that Asian employees are perceived as having higher controlled motivation-being driven by external pressures and expectations rather than personal volition-which leads supervisors to anticipate greater conformity from Asian employees and subsequently exploit them. Across one experiment (Study 1), one multiwave survey (Study 2), and one preregistered experiment with a behavioral measure (Study 3a), we consistently found that Asian employees were perceived as having higher controlled motivation compared to White and Black employees, leading to greater anticipated conformity and exploitation. A second preregistered experiment (Study 3b), in which we directly manipulated perceived controlled motivation, provided causal evidence that higher perceived controlled motivation increased exploitation through anticipated conformity, whereas lower perceived controlled motivation reversed this effect relative to a neutral baseline. We conclude by discussing theoretical implications for research on workplace mistreatment, Asian employees' work experiences, and motivation. title_cn: 他们无论如何都会顺从：关于对亚洲员工剥削的动机刻板印象视角。
abstract_cn: 动机的认知在塑造职场待遇方面起着至关重要的作用，但关于这些认知是如何被社会构建的了解甚少。基于社会交换理论以及对相互依赖自我与独立自我视角的探讨，我们提出了一种基于民族刻板印象的感知动机视角，认为人们对于亚洲员工的认知是其受控动机较高——即受到外部压力和期望的驱动，而非个人意愿——这导致监督者预期亚洲员工会有更大的从众行为，并进一步对其进行剥削。在一项实验（研究1）、一项多波次调查（研究2）和一项经过预注册的行为测量实验（研究3a）中，我们一致发现，与白人和黑人员工相比，亚洲员工被认为拥有更高的受控动机，从而导致更大的预期从众和剥削。在第二项预注册实验（研究3b）中，我们直接操控了感知受控动机，提供了因果证据表明较高的感知受控动机会通过预期从众来增加剥削，而较低的感知受控动机则相对中性基线逆转了这一效果。最后，我们讨论了这一研究对职场虐待、亚洲员工工作经历及动机研究的理论启示。

title: Supplemental Material for Reducing Shrinkage in Diversity Tradeoff Curves for Personnel Selection: Comparing Local Validity Studies, Meta-Analysis, and Bayes Analysis
title_cn: 《减少人员选拔中的多样性权衡曲线收缩的补充材料：比较地方效度研究、元分析和贝叶斯分析》

title: Setting higher referral targets increases the number of women recommended: Evidence from the field and lab.
abstract: Women continue to be underrepresented in numerous occupations and in the highest echelons of many organizations. This may be due, in part, to disadvantages they face in referral-based hiring and promotion processes, as women are less inclined to ask for referrals and less likely to be referred than men for male-dominated jobs. We integrate insights from the goal-setting and creativity literatures to propose an intervention to boost referrals of women: requesting a greater target number of referrals (e.g., at least four instead of at least two referrals). This strategy sets a motivating goal to provide more referrals, which should mechanically increase the number of women referred. In addition, requesting more referrals in male-dominated contexts may lead to prototype divergence, which should increase the rate at which women are referred as people generate additional recommendations. Across two primary studies (a field experiment and an online experiment) and four supplemental studies (another field experiment and three online experiments; all preregistered, total N = 12,615), requesting double the number of referrals increased the number of women referred by 17%-88%. We found evidence that setting more ambitious referral goals mediated the effect of asking for more referrals on the number of women referred, supporting a goals-based account. However, we found inconsistent support for prototype divergence as a mechanism across our studies. Our work establishes a theoretically motivated intervention organizations can use to bolster women's representation in recruitment pipelines in male-dominated settings, and our full-cycle approach establishes its generalizability across contexts. title_cn: 设定更高的推荐目标可以增加被推荐女性的数量：来自实地和实验室的证据。
abstract_cn: 女性在许多职业以及许多组织的高层中仍然处于代表性不足的状态。这部分可能是由于她们在基于推荐的招聘和晋升过程中面临的不利局面，因为女性不太倾向于请求推荐，也不太可能被推荐给男性主导的职位。我们结合目标设定和创造力文献的见解，提出了一项干预措施，以提高女性的推荐人数：请求更高的推荐目标数量（例如，至少四个推荐而不是至少两个推荐）。这一策略设定了一个激励目标，以提供更多的推荐，这应该在机制上增加被推荐的女性数量。此外，在男性主导的环境中请求更多推荐可能会导致原型的多样化，从而在推荐人提供额外推荐时增加女性被推荐的比例。通过两项主要研究（一个实地实验和一个在线实验）和四项补充研究（另一个实地实验和三项在线实验；均已注册，总样本量 N = 12,615），请求双倍数量的推荐增加了被推荐女性的人数17%至88%。我们发现，设定更具雄心的推荐目标在请求更多推荐与被推荐女性人数之间起到了中介作用，支持了基于目标的解释。然而，我们在研究中对原型多样化作为机制的支持并不一致。我们的研究确立了一种理论上有动机的干预措施，组织可以利用该措施来增强男性主导环境中女性在招聘管道中的代表性，我们的全周期方法确立了其在不同环境下的可推广性。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: Alternative organizing, alienation and wage labour: Exploring the importance of democracy in UK worker cooperatives
abstract: Alienation is seen as endemic to the labour process and organizations. Put simply, if workers do not own the means, conditions and results of production they will remain alienated from their product, productive activity, species being and fellow human and non-human others. Some scholars have highlighted that, through their structures of democratic control and collective ownership of the means, conditions and results of labour, worker cooperatives reverse the capital-labour relationship to create a non-exploitative class process and therefore hold possibilities for ‘disalienation’. However, the idea that worker cooperatives can be ‘disalienating’ is by no means universally accepted, with others arguing that subsumption of labour to capital can only be partially addressed through a cooperative’s internal structure. Central to this debate is a worker cooperative’s position within the capitalist market, and we argue, their use of wage labour. This article, based on an 18-month ethnography with 2 worker cooperatives, addresses the question: To what extent are members of worker cooperatives, engaged in wage labour, able to resist the forces of alienation?
title_cn: 替代性组织、异化与工资劳动：探讨民主在英国工人合作社中的重要性
abstract_cn: 异化被视为劳动过程和组织的根深蒂固的问题。简单来说，如果工人不拥有生产的手段、条件和结果，他们将始终与自己的产品、生产活动、物种存在以及同类和非人类他者保持异化。有学者指出，通过民主控制的结构以及对劳动的手段、条件和结果的集体所有制，工人合作社能够逆转资本与劳动的关系，从而创造出一种非剥削性的阶级过程，因此为“去异化”提供了可能性。然而，工人合作社能够“去异化”的观点并不是普遍接受的，其他学者认为，劳动对资本的从属关系只能通过合作社的内部结构得到部分解决。在这一辩论中，工人合作社在资本主义市场中的位置，以及我们主张的其对工资劳动的使用，成为核心问题。本文基于对两个工人合作社进行的18个月民族志研究，探讨了一个问题：参与工资劳动的工人合作社成员在多大程度上能够抵抗异化的力量？
